response:
Brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo every other day, which means she uses 2 ounces per week. In a leap year, there are 52 weeks and 2 days, so she will use 2 ounces per week × 52 weeks = 104 ounces of shampoo. To determine how many 14-ounce bottles she needs, we divide 104 by 14. This gives approximately 7.428, so she will need 8 bottles to cover her shampoo usage.

[She needs to check the exact date of the leap year to ensure the number of days is accurate.] [She should also consider any potential variations in her shampoo usage pattern, such as if she uses more or less than 1/4 ounce on certain days.]
